_comment-vendored: VENDORED into vibe3d (task 0431). This is the `nfde` 0.1.3 D wrapper (Chance Snow, Zlib) plus a pinned copy of btzy/nativefiledialog-extended @ e092bbb under nativefiledialog-extended/. Two changes vs. the registry package: (1) the Linux backend is built with -DNFD_PORTAL=ON so file dialogs go through xdg-desktop-portal (out-of-process) instead of an in-process GTK3 chooser -- this drops the whole GTK/pango/gdk-pixbuf stack from the app; (2) the preBuildCommands no longer git-clone NFD at build time (the sources are vendored, so the build is hermetic and the NFD pin can never silently drift). source/nfde.d and nativefiledialog-extended/src/nfd_portal.cpp carry small local patches -- see third_party/nfde/PATCHES.md for the full patch list, upstream pins, and re-vendor procedure.
name: nfde
description: D bindings to Native File Dialog Extended (vendored, xdg-desktop-portal backend on Linux)
systemDependencies: CMake, Ninja, See `libs` and `lflags` for OS-specific dependencies.
